# Veridex

> Evidence-first regulatory intelligence platform for trade compliance teams.

Veridex helps trade compliance and legal teams find, organize, and understand official legal and regulatory documents with AI-assisted citation verification. The platform unifies global trade regulations and internal documents into one searchable workspace — with verifiable citations, jurisdictional context, and role-based access controls designed for legal-grade accuracy.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, platform capabilities, and access request.
